creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #50)

With the additional patch, I no longer hear a pop.  Nice!

PS: I attached another log when plug in the device.  In devd.conf I executed

  sysctl hw.snd.default_unit=6 dev.pcm.6.play.vchanmode=passthrough dev.pc
m.6.play.vchanformat=s32le:2.0

Hope it may help you.  Although I have no problem with playback now.
